violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

Dishwasher failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. No sanitizer available to sanitize using dishwasher. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Employees are using paper trays. All cooking/serving utensils must be sent to the high school for proper sanitizing. Sanitizer must be obtained and at proper concentration in order to sanitize using dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

The floor under the handsink is constructed of unsealed cement, which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. Tile has eroded away in this area. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
Leak observed at the dishwasher. Plumbing must be maintained in good repair. Leak is to be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2025
The facility is lacking the correct test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023
